videos.video_subject: Why Lamine Yamal is the most ridiculous teenage footballer ever - the records he is breaking younger than Messi and Ronaldo
videos.video_script: Lamine Yamal isn't normal. At sixteen, he became the youngest player ever to score at a European Championship. Messi never did that. Ronaldo never did that. He was starting for Barcelona's first team at fifteen. He's already won a Euro with Spain before he was even allowed to drive. And the scary part? Scouts say he hasn't even come close to his peak. Remember the name.
